courses.title: Intro to Python
courses.detailedDescription: Python is a beginner-friendly language used for web development, AI, automation, data science, and more. In this course, you will learn variables, loops, functions, error handling, file operations, and a mini-project at the end.

courses.title: Web Development with React
courses.detailedDescription: This React course teaches component-based UI, React hooks, routing, props, state management, API integration, Tailwind styling, and deployment. You will build a fully working SPA project.
